name: n8n × Dify RAG Knowledge Base Integration

parameters.content:
# n8n + Dify Integration
n8n HTTP Request → Dify API (RAG) → Process + Respond

Setup: Dify API key in $env.DIFY_API_KEY
Dify base URL in $env.DIFY_BASE_URL

nodes.name: n8n × Dify — RAG Knowledge Base Integration

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query: $json.query, user: $json.user, conversation_id: $json.conversation_id, response_mode: $json.response_mode, inputs: $json.inputs }) }}
